# A Shot of Data Blog

Welcome to my little space on the internet I've carved out for myself.

Whilst it is far from being what I'd like it to be, if I never try start writing and blogging, how will I ever improve?

Hope you enjoy it and take away something from it :)

## Requirements

Some time and patience to read this.


## Built With

* Jekyll

* Github Pages

* Markdown

* Care and Coffee
